title: obione novae-zelandiae
intro: Obione novae-zelandiae, also known as New Zealand saltwort, is a succulent plant native to New Zealand, characterized by its succulent leaves and salt-tolerant properties. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal medicine, Obione novae-zelandiae is valued for its ability to promote health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it is also used in some traditional remedies as a poultice to apply topically.
